overview: Save Shop System is a comprehensive mobile-first shop management app for small business owners. It features batch-based FIFO inventory, smart billing with profit tracking, customer credit ledger, multi-user roles (Owner/Manager/Staff), vendor management, purchase orders with auto-reorder, customer order management, staff performance analytics, returns tracking, and dead stock alerts — all backed by ICP cloud storage with real-time multi-device sync.
features: Vendor Master with purchase history and ledger tracking
Purchase orders with auto-fill reorder and WhatsApp/Email dispatch
Customer order management (Pending/Accepted/Rejected) with sale conversion
Batch-based FIFO inventory with manual batch selection
Smart billing with min price lock, staff bonus, and discount control
Customer credit ledger with payment tracking and WhatsApp reminders
Staff performance and credit risk analytics
Returns system with loss tracking and reason logging
Dead stock alerts with admin-configurable thresholds
Dashboard with 7-section priority layout and real-time updates
ICP cloud backend with per-shop data isolation and multi-device sync
